introSection: Apollo Steamrocket is a steel roller coaster currently located at Kingoland in Plumelin, Brittany, France.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: Blue track and white supports. The ride had brown track when it operated at OK Corral.

fullText:
Apollo Steamrocket is a steel roller coaster currently located at Kingoland in Plumelin, Brittany, France.



Blue track and white supports. The ride had brown track when it operated at OK Corral.
